title: Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple
tagline: Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple complex inside the Thirupuram spiritual park is nestled at the base of a small range of green hills at Thirumalaikodi (or simply Malaikodi) Vello
overview.description: Sri Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple complex inside the Thirupuram spiritual park is nestled at the base of a small range of green hills at Thirumalaikodi (or simply Malaikodi) Vellore in Tamil Nadu, India. It is 120 km from Tirupati, 145 km from Chennai, 160 km from Pondicherry and 200 km from Bengaluru. The Maha Kumbhabhishekam or consecration of the temple and its chief deity, Lakshmi or Maha Lakshmi, the Hindu goddess of wealth, was held on 24 August 2007, and devotees from all religions and backgrounds are welcome to visit.

topPlaces.name: List of areas of Vellore
topPlaces.description: This article provides you the list of major areas in and around the Indian city of Vellore, Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vellore Central Prison
topPlaces.description: Vellore Central Prison (established in 1830) is a prison in Vellore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the largest jail in the district and 2nd largest in Tamil Nadu after puzhal central prison, Convicts sentenced to imprisonment are confined in the jail from various districts of the Presidency as well as from Burma.

topPlaces.name: Thuthipattu
topPlaces.description: Thutthipattu is a census town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Elavambadi
topPlaces.description: Elavambadi is a village in the Anaicut taluka of Vellore district located in Tamil Nadu State, India.

topPlaces.name: Palavansathu
topPlaces.description: Palavansathu is a locality in Vellore City in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This locality of Vellore gives evidence that the area of Vellore was under the administrative control of the Pallava empire.

topPlaces.name: Melmonavoor
topPlaces.description: Melmonavoor or Melmanavur or Melmonavur is a village panchayat in Vellore district, located to pincode 632010. It is located 4.5 kilometres from the city of Vellore.

topPlaces.name: Virupakshipuram
topPlaces.description: Virupakshipuram is a part of Vellore city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Allapuram
topPlaces.description: Allapuram is a part of Vellore city in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India.It is located on vellore's arterial road "Officer's lane" and also this locality is near to Vellore Central Prison.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — List of areas of Vellore & around

items.note: This article provides you the list of major areas in and around the Indian city of Vellore, Tamil Nadu.

Vellore Central Prison (established in 1830) is a prison in Vellore, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the largest jail in the district and 2nd largest in Tamil Nadu after puzhal central prison, Convicts sentenced to imprisonment are confined in the jail from various districts of the Presidency as well as from Burma.
Thutthipattu is a census town in Vellore district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Elavambadi is a village in the Anaicut taluka of Vellore district located in Tamil Nadu State, India.

Palavansathu is a locality in Vellore City in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This locality of Vellore gives evidence that the area of Vellore was under the administrative control of the Pallava empire.
Melmonavoor or Melmanavur or Melmonavur is a village panchayat in Vellore district, located to pincode 632010. It is located 4.5 kilometres from the city of Vellore.
Virupakshipuram is a part of Vellore city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Allapuram is a part of Vellore city in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India.It is located on vellore's arterial road "Officer's lane" and also this locality is near to Vellore Central Prison.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakshmi Narayani Golden Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are List of areas of Vellore, Vellore Central Prison, Thuthipattu, Elavambadi, Palavansathu.
